attacking_style: Participates in early breakaways on lumpy stage openers, capable of sustaining effort through final climbs to contest reduced sprint finishes.
team_tactics: AG2R uses him as breakaway insurance on unpredictable stages while keeping additional options (Latour) for late counterattacks on descents.
terrain_preference: Lumpy, rolling stages with multiple climbs that suit strong all-rounders; has the endurance for long breakaway efforts and climbing legs for final ascents.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to identify specific weaknesses; single observation shows strength in break finishing but lacks evidence of pure climbing or sprinting limits.
key_patterns: Deployed in early breakaways on stages with unclear outcomes or lumpy profiles
Strong early-race form allowing sustained efforts through multiple climbs to finale
AG2R tactical insurance rider when team has multiple cards to play
form_trajectory: positive: demonstrated strong early-race legs and climbing durability to finish second from break at Dauphiné
